key.name: enable-maximize-to-workspace
key.description: When a window is maximized, automatically move it to a new workspace. When unmaximized, return it to the previous workspace.

key.name: enable-stage-sidebar
key.description: Show a sidebar with inactive window thumbnails on the left side of the screen.

key.name: sidebar-width
key.description: Width of the stage manager sidebar in pixels.

key.name: animation-duration
key.description: Duration of sidebar show/hide animations in milliseconds.

key.name: sidebar-auto-hide
key.description: When off (default): sidebar is always visible and hides only when windows overlap it (macOS behavior). When on: sidebar uses hover-to-reveal.

key.name: auto-hide-delay
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before hiding the sidebar after the pointer leaves.

key.name: edge-trigger-width
key.description: Width of the invisible hot zone at the screen edge to trigger the sidebar.

key.name: show-app-icons
key.description: Show application icons below window thumbnails in the sidebar.
